title: Crafter Spells
description: CrafterSpells introduces a collection of utility spells to enhance your Minecraft experience, inspired by the Summoner Spells from League of Legends.
body:
![Crafter Spells](https://i.imgur.com/sn0FMPD.png)

# CrafterSpells

CrafterSpells introduces a collection of utility spells to enhance your Minecraft experience, inspired by the Summoner
Spells from League of Legends. This magic system is designed to complement vanilla gameplay while adding new strategic options for players.

![Spells Menu](https://i.imgur.com/sOnIOIB.png)

## How to Use

All Crafter Spells are given to players by default and can be viewed and selected by accessing the Craft Spells screen by pressing the `M` key (Default).
At any one time, only two Crafter Spells can be assigned from the menu in two dedicated spell slots that appear next to your hotbar. Press the assigned keys (default: `V` and `B`) to cast the spell in each slot. Some spells have immediate effects, while others have cooldowns or special mechanics.

## Spells List
<details>
### Barrier

Creates a magical barrier around you that increases your armor rating and renders a translucent shield effect. The barrier absorbs incoming damage, protecting you from harm.

**Effect:** Increases armor rating
**Duration:** 10 seconds
**Cooldown:** 20 seconds

---

### Bore

Creates a tunnel through solid blocks in the direction you're looking. Perfect for mining or creating quick pathways through mountains.

**Effect:** Bores a cylindrical tunnel (radius 1, length 12 blocks)
**Cooldown:** 40 seconds
**Note:** Doesn't affect bedrock or liquids

---

### Ghost

Transforms you into a ghostly form, allowing you to move 20% faster and pass through solid blocks. Perfect for exploration and escaping tight situations.

**Effect:** 20% increased speed, no-clip through blocks, partial invisibility
**Duration:** 10 seconds
**Cooldown:** 40 seconds

---

### Growth

Enriches the soil in a radius around you, causing crops to instantly grow. A helpful spell for rapid farming and food production.

**Effect:** Instantly grows crops in a 6-block radius
**Cooldown:** 120 seconds
**Note:** Similar to bone meal but affects multiple plants simultaneously

---

### Heal

Restores a portion of your missing health and can also heal a nearby ally you're looking at. A vital spell for survival and team play.

**Effect:** Heals 40% of missing health (minimum 2 health points) for you and a targeted ally
**Range:** 16 blocks for ally targeting
**Cooldown:** 40 seconds

---

### Nourish

Quickly restores hunger and saturation for you and an ally you're looking at. Never worry about food during long expeditions again!

**Effect:** Restores 60% of missing hunger and 40% of missing saturation
**Range:** 16 blocks for ally targeting
**Cooldown:** 120 seconds

---

### Saturate

A combat spell that drains the hunger of opponents, preventing them from sprinting. Gives you a strategic advantage in PvP encounters.

**Effect:** Reduces target's hunger by 8 points, sets saturation to 0, and applies Hunger effect
**Range:** 20 blocks
**Cooldown:** 120 seconds

---

### Snowball

A two-phase spell. First cast throws a magical snowball that marks the first entity it hits. Second cast teleports you directly to the marked entity.

**Phase 1:** Throws a snowball projectile that marks the first entity hit
**Phase 2:** Teleports to the marked entity
**Range:** 20 blocks (projectile), 50 blocks (teleport range)
**Cooldown:** Only applied after teleportation or if the snowball misses - 40 seconds
</details>

## Planned Features

- Additional spells with unique effects
- Configuration
- Multi-Language Support
